case_title: SHEEHAN, MARGARET V vs. BOLANOS, NUVIA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEEHAN, MARGARET V AS TO DEFENDANT BOLANOS, NUVIA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLANOS, NUVIA HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER. FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLANOS, NUVIA
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF AUG-20-1993, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CCP 430.10(E) & 1161(3).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT BOLANOS, NUVIA ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $80.00
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLANOS, NUVIA
